Community

More than an app.
A movement.

visha is home to Kenya's most vibrant community of sustainable fashion lovers. Whether you're a Gikomba vendor, a vintage hunter, or just getting started — you belong here.

Become a Member How It Works

Why join the community?

Inside visha, community is built in — not bolted on.

event_available

In-App Events

Discover and RSVP to sip-and-swaps, Gikomba tours, and DIY upcycling workshops — all organised through the app.

campaign

Seller Spotlights

Get featured on the app's discover feed. We celebrate the most creative curators in our network every week.

badge

Ambassador Program

Top sellers earn Ambassador status — exclusive badges, early access to new features, and networking opportunities.

This month's
featured curator

"Thrifting in Nairobi isn't just about cheap clothes — it's about preserving stories. visha made it easy to find my tribe."

Sarah Jenkins

Vintage Collector · on visha since 2023

mail

Join the Kenyan Waitlist

Get on the early access list and receive a founding member badge when we launch in Nairobi.

check_circle You're on the list — we'll be in touch!

No spam. Just launch updates.
